## Background

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposal

Describe the feature or improvement you want.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternative approaches you considered.

## Additional Context

Add any extra context, mockups, or examples here.

## Security Check

- [ ] I have removed any secrets, tokens, passwords, internal IPs, and private URLs.
